title: Explicit date-range match filtering is implemented but not exposed as a tool parameter
evidence: store.go:60-62 MatchFilter has DateFrom/DateTo, but tools.go:171-177 searchMatchesArgs and the search_matches inputSchema (tools.go:18-27) expose only season — no date_from/date_to. R4 is still satisfied via the season filter.
suggestion: Add optional date_from/date_to properties to search_matches to surface the existing MatchFilter date-range support.

title: Cross-source fixture deduplication beyond spec
evidence: loader.go:130-143 dedupeMatches removes fixtures duplicated across Brasileirao_Matches.csv / novo_campeonato_brasileiro.csv / BR-Football-Dataset.csv by (competition, season, teams, score), preventing triple-counted standings/stats.
suggestion: None — noted as a robustness enhancement, not a deduction.

title: Team-name normalization distinguishes identity-bearing from decorative state suffixes
evidence: normalize.go:29-33 curated brazilianStateCodes + alias handling keeps Atletico-MG/PR/GO distinct while collapsing Palmeiras-SP -> Palmeiras; pinned by Test_Given...ItDoesNotCollapseIntoTheMajorClub in normalize_test.go.
suggestion: None — noted as a correctness enhancement.
